reason: The remediation only edits NTP/chrony configuration files to add or modify the maxpoll parameter. This is a straightforward text substitution that does not affect authentication, bootloader, or filesystem layout, and the change can be validated quickly. The risk of locking out the system is negligible; the worst case is a temporary loss of time synchronization, which can be restored by restarting the service.
estimated_impact: networking affected; Potential NTP/chrony service interruption if configuration syntax is incorrect; Possible loss of accurate time until service is restarted
